title: Homing Attack and Boost
description: Use Sonic's Homing Attack and Boost in Minecraft
body:
## Use Sonic's Homing Attack and Boost in Minecraft!

Press 'Z' while in midair and looking at a mob to do a homing attack. Damage scales with stronger armor.

Hold 'B' to boost.

Also includes functional Dash Panel, Dash Ring, and Spring blocks!

**This mod requires Architectury API and Fzzy Config.** Fabric API is required on Fabric.
Thanks to [KosmX for making the animations possible](https://github.com/KosmX/minecraftPlayerAnimator), and [Rubberross for the spin dash animation](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HapvkfkrNtI)!

For multiplayer, this mod must be installed on the server and client!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9DPewlmy/images/a606847d20f7108719d3eafbac142755d8c2d4f2.jpeg)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9DPewlmy/images/ffd2c7abdf017107936b32c4bf6dbc50ba794b12.jpeg)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9DPewlmy/images/3c72f77b1646aaa05d4f3446c234e4e1babaf8d5.png)

This mod is fan-made and unaffiliated with Sega. Concepts and sounds in this mod belong to Sega.
